texto: As the sun rules the day and the moon governs the night, so too, we are connected by: the air that we breathe, light that we see and the darkness that follows. Life is too short to waste it on disagreements. Surely, we can all agree to disagree. So let us find a common ground, form a union and spread joy, happiness and freedom around the world for the benefit of you, me and the future generations to come.
explicacao: Citação de Raymond Beresford Hamilton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “As the sun rules the day and the moon governs the night, so too, we are connected by: the air tha…” articula amor, action, love-and-romance em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
